title: Africa’s abundant gas reserves offer immediate solutions to prevailing problems – Seplat CEO - FinancialEDGE
description: Africa has abundant gas reserves, and these rich reserves offer immediate solutions to the continent’s immediate and prevailing challenges if well leveraged. The Chief Executive Officer, Seplat energy Plc, Mr. Roger Brown, said this during the ongoing Africa Oil Week (AOW) Conference and Exhibition in Cape Town, South Africa.
